features_added: IWSDK 0.4.1 project scaffolding with dual-runtime (XR + browser)
Physics-based 2D billiards engine (ball-ball, ball-rail, pocket detection, friction, substeps)
Standard pool table with correct dimensions, 6 pockets, rails, diamonds, head string
16 neon holodeck-styled balls (solids 1-7, stripes 9-15, 8-ball, cue ball) with glow, wireframe, shadows
Cue stick with charge-and-release mechanic, power bar, trajectory guide line
4 game modes: 8-Ball (full rules), 9-Ball, Free Play, Trick Shots (4 challenges)
8-ball rules: solids/stripes assignment, first-pocket decides, 8-ball win/loss, scratch handling
9-ball rules: must hit lowest, pocket 9 to win
VR controller input: trigger charge/release, right thumbstick aim, B pause, A confirm, left thumbstick ball-in-hand
Browser input: click-charge, mouse aim, right-drag camera orbit, scroll zoom, ESC pause
Ball-in-hand after scratch (move and place with VR thumbstick or browser)
8 PanelUI .uikitml templates: title, mode select, HUD, pause, game over, settings, leaderboard, message toast
Head-following HUD (Follower + PivotY) for score, player name, mode, shot count, power bar, ball counts
Head-following message toast for game events (BREAK, NICE SHOT, SCRATCH, etc.)
World-space panels for menus (title screen, mode select, pause, game over, settings, leaderboard)
Holodeck environment: neon grid floor/ceiling/walls, 16 floating wireframe decorations, 50 ambient particles
Dramatic table lighting (3 colored point lights, fog)
Procedural Web Audio: ball hits, rail bounces, pocket sounds, scratch, cue hit, game start/win/lose fanfares, ambient drone + pad
Camera orbit system (browser mode): right-drag orbit, scroll zoom, tracks cue ball
Leaderboard with localStorage persistence (top 20, sorted by shots)
Statistics tracking (total games, best streak)
GitHub repo created and deployed to GitHub Pages

features_completed: Neon holodeck pool table with pockets/rails/diamonds
